description: A Meeting and Event Planner at TechSummit 2024 needs to configure the completion workflow for the existing 'TechSummit 2024 Post-Conference Evaluation' survey before launching it to attendees. Configure the survey's end message to: "Thank you for completing the TechSummit 2024 evaluation! Your feedback directly shapes next year's conference. As a token of appreciation, our platinum sponsor GlobalTech Solutions is offering all respondents a 20% discount — you will be redirected shortly." Set the End URL to https://www.globaltechsolutions.com/techsummit2024-thankyou with the description "GlobalTech Solutions Sponsor Offer" and enable automatic redirection. Additionally, configure the survey to send basic admin notification emails to events@techsummit2024.org upon submission, enable the option for participants to save and resume later, and enable date stamping on responses. Activate the survey once all settings are configured.
